title: GrowerHub small farm management platform
description: Connect Zigbee2MQTT to GrowerHub, automatically find devices, create zones and manage your small farm from one dashboard.

hero.text: GrowerHub brings extensive practical experience in greenhouse automation into one dashboard: sensors, smart plugs, zones, history and control scenarios. Get started independently and for free. If you need help, message us in Telegram in Russian or English.

tasks.title: See all equipment
tasks.text: Zigbee2MQTT transmits a list of devices and their available metrics without manually setting each model.

tasks.title: Collect your zones
tasks.text: Create rooms, greenhouses and grow boxes using only a name, then assign discovered devices.

tasks.title: Follow changes
tasks.text: See current values, connection status and reading history in one interface.

tasks.title: Manage gradually
tasks.text: Start with manual commands, then add light schedules and climate thresholds.

capabilities: several isolated Zigbee coordinators in one user space
direct connection of a new installation Zigbee2MQTT via MQTT with TLS encryption
local bridge for existing Zigbee2MQTT and Home Assistant without replacing local MQTT
automatic discovery of devices, metrics and allowed commands
zones, dashboard, reading history and manual control
lighting schedule and climate thresholds; plants remain an additional function

compatibility.title: MQTT and Zigbee2MQTT
compatibility.text: GrowerHub works with Zigbee2MQTT data. Every discovered device is shown with its available metrics, while unknown or unverified commands remain read-only. Most cloud-based Tuya Wi-Fi sensors cannot be reconfigured to use third-party MQTT.

stages.title: 1. Login
stages.text: Use Yandex or Google without a payment card or a questionnaire about plants.

stages.title: 2. Coordinator
stages.text: Create a connection and select a new installation or local bridge.

stages.title: 3. Package
stages.text: Choose Windows, Raspberry Pi/Linux or a manual Zigbee2MQTT configuration.

stages.title: 4. Devices
stages.text: Wait for connection and existing devices to appear automatically, or allow new devices to connect for three minutes.

stages.title: 5. Zone
stages.text: Enter a name, distribute devices and open the dashboard.

stages.title: 6. Automation
stages.text: Optional: enable tested scenarios one at a time.

screens.title: Zones
screens.text: The state of the microclimate and equipment for each zone.

screens.title: Sensor history
screens.text: Synthetic graph of temperature and humidity per day.

screens.title: Connection
screens.text: Coordinator connection status and automatically found devices.

screens.title: Automation
screens.text: Light schedule and climate threshold with clear readiness status.

limitations: GrowerHub supports Zigbee2MQTT devices and is constantly expanding the catalog of proven models and scenarios.
Commands are only available for verified control capabilities; the unknown device remains visible but is read-only.
For equipment with water and mains power, use water protection, check the load and provide a physical emergency shutdown.
Watering is turned on after assigning a humidity sensor, pump and protective restrictions.
early_access: The main functions of GrowerHub are already available for free and without a card. Connect equipment, create zones and start managing your farm in one dashboard.
